changelog:
Persist the bounded recent-request log across restarts. The service restores the newest 1,000 metadata-only entries from data/request_log.json, preserves request IDs, batches atomic disk writes, uses owner-only file permissions, and flushes pending records during graceful shutdown. Corrupt state is ignored without blocking startup.
最近请求日志现在可跨重启保留。服务会从 data/request_log.json 恢复最近 1000 条仅含元数据的记录并延续请求 ID；写入采用合并、原子替换和仅所有者可读写权限，正常关闭时强制落盘。文件损坏不会阻止服务启动。
